name: orphaned_lock_file
description: The workspace includes an orphaned .beads.lock file left behind by a killed process or external sync tool.
source_hint: Covers the cloud-drive/editor interference class from beads_rust-rsei.3.3.
notes: The lock file is intentionally stale metadata, not an active lock held by this test process.

Per the post-#292 contract any non-OK doctor check causes `ok=false` and a non-zero exit; the stale lock plus db-newer drift trip WARN-level checks so doctor reports workspace_health=degraded and exits 1.
